mapper.sql: p.id, p.tracking_number, p.receiver_name, p.receiver_phone, p.express_company_id, p.weight, p.pickup_code, p.shelf_id, p.status, p.in_time, p.out_time, p.remark, ec.company_name, s.shelf_code
LEFT JOIN express_company ec ON p.express_company_id = ec.id LEFT JOIN shelf s ON p.shelf_id = s.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO package (tracking_number, receiver_name, receiver_phone, express_company_id, weight, pickup_code, shelf_id, status, remark) VALUES (#{trackingNumber}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{expressCompanyId}, #{weight}, #{pickupCode}, #{shelfId}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE package SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE package SET out_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE package SET pickup_code = #{pickupCode} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM package p
WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM package p
WHERE p.tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}

SELECT FROM package p
WHERE p.pickup_code = #{pickupCode}

SELECT FROM package p
WHERE p.receiver_phone = #{phone} AND p.status = 0

SELECT FROM package p
WHERE p.receiver_phone IN
#{phone}
AND p.status = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package p
AND p.tracking_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{trackingNumber}, '%')
AND p.pickup_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pickupCode}, '%')
AND p.receiver_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND p.status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE DATE(in_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE DATE(out_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND status = 0
